evidence: "One of the best sci-fi films of all time."
"Good horror movie. Brings back childhood memories."
"This movie never gets dull, always great fun to watch this."
"Blu ray quality is excellent and the sound is superior as well."
"Great movie....comes with Digital Copy code redemption through iTunes, Vudu or Amazon Instant Video."
"Excellent movie, excellent blu ray quality....but, the sound varies from very high music to low whispered dialogue."

"Okay movie, rather dull and sending a wrong message to fathers as well."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for sci-fi, horror, and comedy genres, appreciating fast-paced narratives with high production quality. However, they express dissatisfaction with narrative complexity and emotional engagement, indicating a preference for straightforward storytelling.
